modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help setting up ImageNow printer access for users.

full_description_text:  
I’m trying to set up the ImageNow printer at my desk. I need to know what steps to take. Also, can you please give access to some users so they can print to ImageNow? It’s important for them to be able to use it.
short_description: Need help setting up ImageNow printer access for users.
description: I’m trying to set up the ImageNow printer at my desk. I need to know what steps to take. Also, can you please give access to some users so they can print to ImageNow? It’s important for them to be able to use it.
